description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node Docker image, set GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive, and define a shared before_script that downloads Hugo v0.78.1 via curl, extracts it, and installs netlify-cli@2.9.1 globally. Add a build stage with two jobs: a "build and prod" job that runs only on the master branch, executes ./hugo -b "https://www.recalbox.com/" then netlify deploy -d public -s "${NETLIFY_PROJECT_ID}" -a "${NETLIFY_AUTH_TOKEN}" --prod, and is tagged wwwbuild; and a "build and review" job that runs on all other branches (except master), executes ./hugo then netlify deploy -d public -s "${NETLIFY_PROJECT_ID}" -a "${NETLIFY_AUTH_TOKEN}", also tagged wwwbuild. Both jobs inherit the shared before_script and have no caches or artifacts, and they deploy the generated site to Netlify.
